perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women stand behind a loaded Costco shopping cart at the entrance of a warehouse store. One woman wears a black top and the other wears a white dress with a beret; the latter holds up a small card. (2) A close-up shot shows a miniature "Business Member" Costco card held between fingers. (3) A person's arms are shown with multiple rows of miniature cards pinned to their sleeves. (4) The scene returns to the two women who are gesturing with thumbs up and heart signs while smiling at the camera. The Costco Wholesale logo is overlaid at the top of the frame throughout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and energetic pop music starts playing at a medium tempo. A high-pitched, excited female voice says "This is my membership card, this is a super mini membership card!". (2) The music continues as the female voice explains that viewers can now collect these mini cards, specifically the business member version. (3) A deep male voice is heard off-screen asking if there will be a black version in the future. (4) The female voice responds enthusiastically over the music, ending with a comment about how cute the cards are. Faint ambient warehouse noise and occasional chime sound effects are heard.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "這是我的會員卡" (Functional Text: This is my membership card). (2) "超迷你會員卡" (Hook Text: Super mini membership card, in large yellow animated font). (3) "商業會員卡" (Functional Text: Business membership card). (4) "就可以免費領取" (Hook Text: You can get it for free). (5) "數量有限趕快來拿" (Hook Text: Limited quantity, come get it fast). (6) "真的很好看" (Functional Text: It really looks good/cute).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro with characters -> Close-up of product -> Staff demonstration -> Call to action and banter.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, and hands/arms of 1 staff member shown holding cards.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman is dressed in a black cut-out top with headphones; the other is dressed in a white lace dress and a dark beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco entrance featuring red 'Entrance' signs, shopping carts, and other shoppers in the distance.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is designed to promote a limited-time giveaway of miniature Costco membership cards. It uses high-energy delivery and clear visual evidence of the 'cute' novelty item to encourage viewers to visit the store and follow their social media page to receive the item.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video revolves entirely around a Costco membership card promotion and features the brand logo prominently.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-pitched enthusiastic narration with variety-show style text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the 'kawaii' or 'cute' culture by focusing on the miniature size of a functional object to drive social media engagement.
